name: blueconic-mcp
description: Let Claude query and manage your BlueConic tenant — profiles, segments, connections, content stores, models, and more.
long_description:
Connect Claude to your BlueConic Customer Data Platform using OAuth credentials from an application configured in your tenant. Claude can look up profiles, segments, and profile properties; inspect connections and their run history; review dialogues, channels, listeners, and plugins; explore content stores, groups, models, lifecycles, and objectives; retrieve timeline event data and reporting statistics; and browse notebooks, users, roles, and audit events.

Write access is available when your OAuth application includes the appropriate scopes — Claude can then create and update profiles, profile properties, groups, content store items, URL mappings, and machine learning models.

The connector runs locally on your machine, authenticates only with your configured tenant, and calls a reviewed set of BlueConic REST API v2 endpoints.

tenant_url.title: BlueConic Tenant URL
tenant_url.description: Your BlueConic tenant URL, for example https://your-tenant.blueconic.net

client_id.title: OAuth Client ID
client_id.description: Client ID from BlueConic Settings > Access management > Applications

client_secret.title: OAuth Client Secret
client_secret.description: Client secret from BlueConic Settings > Access management > Applications
